title: Ganpati Temple
tagline: Ganpati Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Lord Ganapati Temple is situated in the city of Tasgaon in Sangli district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
overview.description: The Lord Ganapati Temple is situated in the city of Tasgaon in Sangli district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Most of the Ganapati idols have a left-sided trunk, while this temple's idols' trunk bends towards the right. The Ganapati idol with the trunk curved towards the right is said to be 'active (jagrut)’. This Ganapati is regarded as a living idol, ready to bless communities with good luck, wisdom, prosperity and happiness.

topPlaces.name: Upalavi
topPlaces.description: Upalavi (Village ID 568674) is a village in the Tehsil tasgaon of Sangli district, Maharashtra, India, about 18 kilometres north of Sangli. It is situated along the Sangli-Tasgaon state highway.

topPlaces.name: Kavathe Ekand
topPlaces.description: Kavathe Ekand is a village in the Tasgaon tehsil of Sangli district in Maharashtra, India. The temple is known for the large-scale decorative fireworks and lighting display that occurs during the annual Vijayadashami festival, lasting all night until sunrise.

topPlaces.name: Tasgaon
topPlaces.description: Tasgaon (Marathi: tāsagāva, pronounced [ˈt̪aːsɡaːʋ] ) is a city and municipal council in Sangli district, Maharashtra, India. Known as the "City of Grapes," Tasgaon is a major centre for grape cultivation, raisin production, and agro-based industries.

topPlaces.name: Kumathe
topPlaces.description: Kumathe is a village in the tehsil Tasgaon of Sangli district, Maharashtra, India, about 18 kilometres north of Sangli. Its situated along the Sangli-Tasgaon state highway.

topPlaces.name: Soni, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Soni is a village in Taluka - Miraj in southern Maharashtra State, India. Farming is the main business in Soni.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ganpati Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ganpati Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ganpati Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (150 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ganpati Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ganpati Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ganpati Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ganpati Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ganpati Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Upalavi, Kavathe Ekand, Tasgaon, Kumathe, Soni, Maharashtra.
